Poker Hand #RC1000004: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02) - 2026/05/21 03:01:30
Table 'TestTable' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero ($2 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain1 ($2 in chips)
Hero: posts small blind $0.01
Villain1: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [As Ks]
Hero: raises $0.04 to $0.06
Villain1: calls $0.04
*** FLOP *** [Kc 7d 2c]
Villain1: checks
Hero: bets $0.08
Villain1: calls $0.08
*** TURN *** [Kc 7d 2c] [3h]
Villain1: checks
Hero: bets $0.20
Villain1: calls $0.20
*** RIVER *** [Kc 7d 2c 3h] [9s]
Villain1: checks
Hero: checks
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Hero: shows [As Ks] (a pair of Kings)
Villain1: shows [Qh Qd] (a pair of Queens)
Hero collected $0.65 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.68 | Rake $0.03 | Jackpot $0 | Bingo $0 | Fortune $0 | Tax $0
Board [Kc 7d 2c 3h 9s]
Seat 1: Hero (button) (small blind) showed [As Ks] and won ($0.65) with a pair of Kings
Seat 2: Villain1 (big blind) showed [Qh Qd] and lost with a pair of Queens
